description: The VolumeMeter component can be used to get the volume of an inputted audio source.

fields.Smoothing: Smooth lerp the ``Volume`` field this much.
fields.Power: Raise ``Volume`` to this exponent. 1 will leave ``Volume`` unchanged.
fields.Method: Whether the outputted value should be the current volume, or the change in volume over time (delta)
fields.Source: The audio source to read the volume of (as long as it's streaming or playing).
fields.Volume: The current volume of ``Source`` raised to the exponent ``Power``, after smoothing factor of ``Smoothing``.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide any IAudioSource to ``Source``. When audio data is being generated by ``Source`` the ``Volume`` field will start changing values.
